courses.name: Linear Algebra for Scientists and Engineers
topics: Systems of linear equations: Gaussian elimination, matrix form
Matrix algebra: addition, multiplication, inverse, transpose
Determinants: properties, computation, Cramer's rule
Vector spaces: subspaces, linear independence, basis, dimension
Eigenvalues and eigenvectors: characteristic polynomial, diagonalization
Applications in science and engineering

courses.name: Calculus 4 for Honours Mathematics
topics: Vector fields: gradient, divergence, curl, Laplacian
Line integrals: work, circulation, path independence, potential functions
Surface integrals: flux, orientation, parametric surfaces
Green's theorem: statement, applications, area calculations
Divergence theorem: Gauss's theorem, applications to flux
Stokes' theorem: curl and circulation, applications

courses.name: Introduction to Computational Mathematics
topics: Numerical linear algebra: LU decomposition, Cholesky, QR
Solving linear systems: direct and iterative methods
Eigenvalue problems: power iteration, QR algorithm
Numerical differentiation: finite differences, truncation error
Numerical integration: Newton-Cotes, Gaussian quadrature
Error analysis: rounding error, truncation error, stability

courses.name: Introduction to Differential Equations
topics: First-order ODEs: separable, linear, exact, Bernoulli, Riccati
Applications: population models, mixing problems, radioactive decay
Second-order linear ODEs: homogeneous and non-homogeneous, undetermined coefficients, variation of parameters
Higher-order linear ODEs: characteristic equation, reduction of order
Systems of linear ODEs: matrix methods, eigenvalue method, phase portraits
Laplace transforms: definition, properties, solving IVPs, unit step and impulse functions

courses.name: Introduction to Differential Equations (Advanced Level)
topics: First-order ODEs: qualitative analysis, existence and uniqueness theorems
Linear ODEs: fundamental solutions, Wronskian, variation of parameters
Series solutions: ordinary points, regular singular points, Frobenius method
Systems of linear ODEs: fundamental matrix, matrix exponential
Nonlinear systems: phase plane analysis, linearization, stability
Boundary value problems: Sturm-Liouville theory, eigenfunction expansions

courses.name: Differential Equations for Engineering
topics: First-order ODEs: separable, linear, exact, applications
Second-order linear ODEs: constant coefficients, undetermined coefficients, variation of parameters
Mechanical vibrations: free and forced vibrations, damping, resonance
Laplace transforms: solving IVPs, transfer functions, convolution
Systems of ODEs: eigenvalue method, phase portraits
Numerical methods: Euler's method, Runge-Kutta methods

courses.name: Differential Equations 2 for Engineering
topics: Series solutions: Frobenius method, Bessel functions
Boundary value problems: Sturm-Liouville theory, eigenvalues
Partial differential equations: heat equation, wave equation, Laplace's equation
Separation of variables: solution of PDEs on rectangular domains
Fourier series: expansion, convergence, applications to PDEs
Introduction to finite difference methods for PDEs

courses.name: Applied Real Analysis
topics: Metric spaces: convergence, continuity, completeness, compactness
Normed linear spaces: Banach spaces, Hilbert spaces
Function spaces: C[a,b], Lp spaces, inner product spaces
Linear operators: boundedness, norm, adjoint operators
Spectral theory: eigenvalues, resolvent, compact operators
Applications to integral equations and differential equations

courses.name: Applied Complex Analysis
topics: Complex functions: analytic functions, Cauchy-Riemann equations
Elementary functions: exponential, trigonometric, logarithmic, power functions
Complex integration: Cauchy's integral theorem, Cauchy's integral formula
Series representations: Taylor series, Laurent series
Residue theory: residues, residue theorem, evaluation of real integrals
Conformal mapping: transformations, applications to boundary value problems

courses.name: Computational Methods for Differential Equations
topics: Finite difference methods: discretization, stability, convergence
Finite element methods: weak formulation, basis functions, assembly
Spectral methods: Chebyshev polynomials, Fourier methods
Time-stepping methods: explicit and implicit schemes, Runge-Kutta
Solving PDEs: heat equation, wave equation, advection equation
Implementation using scientific computing libraries

courses.name: Introduction to Partial Differential Equations
topics: Classification of PDEs: hyperbolic, parabolic, elliptic
Heat equation: derivation, fundamental solution, maximum principle
Wave equation: d'Alembert's formula, characteristics, energy methods
Laplace's equation: harmonic functions, mean value property, Dirichlet problem
Separation of variables: eigenfunction expansions, Sturm-Liouville theory
Green's functions: method of images, representation formulas

courses.name: Ordinary Differential Equations 2
topics: Nonlinear ODEs: phase plane analysis, stability, bifurcation theory
Lyapunov functions: stability criteria, LaSalle's invariance principle
Perturbation methods: regular and singular perturbations, boundary layers
Asymptotic expansions: method of multiple scales, WKB method
Hamiltonian systems: conservation laws, integrability
Applications in physics and biology

courses.name: Partial Differential Equations 2
topics: First-order PDEs: method of characteristics, shock waves
Conservation laws: weak solutions, Rankine-Hugoniot condition
Elliptic PDEs: regularity, variational formulation, Sobolev spaces
Parabolic PDEs: regularity, maximum principles, long-time behavior
Hyperbolic PDEs: characteristics, energy estimates
Introduction to nonlinear PDEs: solitons, KdV equation

courses.name: Advanced Computational Methods for Engineers
topics: Computational fluid dynamics: Navier-Stokes equations, discretization
Finite volume methods: conservation laws, flux calculations
Advanced finite element methods: hp-adaptivity, mixed methods
Multigrid methods: smoothing, coarse grid correction
Parallel computing: domain decomposition, MPI, OpenMP
High-performance computing for engineering applications

courses.name: Applied Mathematics in Biology and Medicine
topics: Population dynamics: Lotka-Volterra models, competition, predation
Epidemiology: SIR model, basic reproduction number, vaccination strategies
Neuroscience: Hodgkin-Huxley model, FitzHugh-Nagumo model
Pharmacokinetics: compartmental models, drug delivery
Pattern formation: Turing instability, reaction-diffusion systems
Tumor growth modeling: avascular and vascular growth

courses.name: Advanced Engineering Mathematics 1
topics: Vector calculus review: gradient, divergence, curl, integral theorems
Complex variables: analytic functions, contour integration, conformal mapping
Fourier analysis: Fourier series, Fourier transforms, applications
Laplace transforms: advanced applications, inverse transforms
Partial differential equations: separation of variables, eigenfunction expansions
Applications in electromagnetism and fluid mechanics

courses.name: Advanced Engineering Mathematics 2
topics: Special functions: Bessel functions, Legendre polynomials, spherical harmonics
Green's functions: PDEs with forcing, method of images
Integral equations: Fredholm and Volterra equations, solution methods
Calculus of variations: Euler-Lagrange equation, constrained optimization
Perturbation methods: boundary layers, multiple scales, WKB
Applications to continuum mechanics and wave propagation

courses.name: Fluid Mechanics 1
topics: Fluid kinematics: Lagrangian and Eulerian descriptions, streamlines
Conservation laws: mass, momentum, energy, Navier-Stokes equations
Inviscid flow: Euler equations, Bernoulli's equation, potential flow
Vorticity dynamics: vorticity equation, circulation, Kelvin's theorem
Viscous flow: Couette flow, Poiseuille flow, Stokes flow
Boundary layers: Prandtl's equations, separation, drag

courses.name: Fluid Mechanics 2
topics: Turbulence: Reynolds averaging, closure problem, turbulence models
Instability: hydrodynamic stability, Rayleigh-Bénard convection
Waves in fluids: surface gravity waves, internal waves, Rossby waves
Nonlinear waves: solitons, KdV equation, shallow water equations
Geophysical fluid dynamics: rotating flows, Coriolis effect
Computational fluid dynamics: numerical methods for complex flows

courses.name: Mathematical Biology
topics: Continuous population models: logistic growth, predator-prey, competition
Discrete population models: difference equations, chaos, bifurcations
Spatial models: reaction-diffusion equations, Turing patterns
Stochastic models: birth-death processes, branching processes
Evolutionary dynamics: replicator equation, evolutionary game theory
Case studies: infectious disease spread, ecosystem dynamics, cancer modeling

courses.name: Numerical Differential Equations
topics: Numerical ODEs: Runge-Kutta methods, multistep methods, stability
Numerical PDEs: finite differences, finite elements, finite volumes
Consistency, stability, and convergence: Lax equivalence theorem
Stiff ODEs: implicit methods, BDF methods, stability regions
Adaptive methods: step size control, error estimation
Implementation and performance optimization
